testcase.name: test_exception_details

failure.message: TypeError: InsightExtractorError() takes no keyword arguments

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_exceptions.py:33: in test_exception_details err = InsightExtractorError("boom", details=details) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: InsightExtractorError() takes no keyword arguments

testcase.name: test_exception_details_default

failure.message: AttributeError: 'InsightExtractorError' object has no attribute 'details'

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_exceptions.py:40: in test_exception_details_default assert err.details == {} ^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'InsightExtractorError' object has no attribute 'details'

testcase.name: test_is_value_error

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance(ConfigLoadError('bad config'), ValueError)

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_exceptions.py:48: in test_is_value_error assert isinstance(err, ValueError) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance(ConfigLoadError('bad config'), ValueError)

testcase.name: test_message_and_details

failure.message: TypeError: ConfigLoadError() takes no keyword arguments

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_exceptions.py:52: in test_message_and_details err = ConfigLoadError("parse failed", details={"line": 3}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: ConfigLoadError() takes no keyword arguments

testcase.name: test_is_runtime_error

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance(ModelLoadError('model not found'), RuntimeError)

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_exceptions.py:62: in test_is_runtime_error assert isinstance(err, RuntimeError) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance(ModelLoadError('model not found'), RuntimeError)

testcase.name: test_details

failure.message: TypeError: PatternCompileError() takes no keyword arguments

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_exceptions.py:94: in test_details err = PatternCompileError("bad pattern", details={"pattern": "[invalid"}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: PatternCompileError() takes no keyword arguments

testcase.name: test_model_serialization

testcase.name: test_init_defaults

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ('s', 'es', 'ed', 'ing', 'er', 'est', 'ly', 'tion', 'ness', 'ment') == []
Left contains 10 more items, first extra item: 's'
Full diff: - [] + ( + 's', + 'es', + 'ed', + 'ing', + 'er', + 'est', + 'ly', + 'tion', + 'ness', + 'ment', + )

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_stemmer.py:19: in test_init_defaults assert stemmer.custom_suffixes == [] E AssertionError: assert ('s', 'es', 'ed', 'ing', 'er', 'est', 'ly', 'tion', 'ness', 'ment') == [] E E Left contains 10 more items, first extra item: 's' E E Full diff: E - [] E + ( E + 's', E + 'es', E + 'ed', E + 'ing', E + 'er', E + 'est', E + 'ly', E + 'tion', E + 'ness', E + 'ment', E + )

testcase.name: test_compile_keywords_empty

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None is not None + where None = DynamicKeywordStemmer(stem_mode=<StemMode.STEM: 'stem'>, case_sensitive=False, keywords=0, suffixes=10).compiled_pattern

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_stemmer.py:82: in test_compile_keywords_empty assert stemmer.compiled_pattern is not None E AssertionError: assert None is not None E + where None = DynamicKeywordStemmer(stem_mode=<StemMode.STEM: 'stem'>, case_sensitive=False, keywords=0, suffixes=10).compiled_pattern

testcase.name: test_compile_keywords_single

failure.message: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'search'

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_stemmer.py:88: in test_compile_keywords_single assert stemmer.compiled_pattern.search("ransomware") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'search'

testcase.name: test_compile_keywords_multiple

failure.message: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'search'

testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_stemmer.py:95: in test_compile_keywords_multiple assert stemmer.compiled_pattern.search(kw), f"failed to match {kw}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'search'

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None is not None + where None = DynamicKeywordStemmer(stem_mode=<StemMode.STEM: 'stem'>, case_sensitive=False, keywords=0, suffixes=10).compiled_pattern

testcase.name: test_compile_typed_patterns

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'malware' in {'proper_nouns': re.compile('(\\bCVE(?:s|es|ed|ing|er|est|ly|tion|ness|ment)?\\b)', re.IGNORECASE), 'general_terms': re.compile('(\\bransomware(?:s|es|ed|ing|er|est|ly|tion|ness|ment)?\\b)', re.IGNORECASE)}

testcase.name: test_add_keyword

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None + where None = <built-in method search of re.Pattern object at 0x2cd04a30>('ransomware') + where <built-in method search of re.Pattern object at 0x2cd04a30> = re.compile('(\\bphishing(?:s|es|ed|ing|er|est|ly|tion|ness|ment)?\\b)', re.IGNORECASE).search + where re.compile('(\\bphishing(?:s|es|ed|ing|er|est|ly|tion|ness|ment)?\\b)', re.IGNORECASE) = DynamicKeywordStemmer(stem_mode=<StemMode.STEM: 'stem'>, case_sensitive=False, keywords=1, suffixes=10).compiled_pattern

failure.message: assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_extract_all

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('ransomware' in set() or 'CVE' in set() or 'exploit' in set())
